title: ‘Baywatch’ Adds Nadia Gray to Recurring Cast
content:
ByMatt Donnelly

Chief Correspondent

Fox‘s hotly anticipated “Baywatch” reboot has addedNadia Grayas a recurring guest star,Varietyhas confirmed.

Gray will play Lisa, an EMT and partner to the team of lifeguards bounding down Venice Beach. The character is said to have a particular affinity for one person on the Baywatch squad. The actor joins a previously-announced ensemble of Stephen Amell, Brooks Nader, Hassie Harrison, Shay Mitchell, Jessica Belkin, Thaddeus LaGrone, Livvy Dunne and Noah Beck.

Gray will next be seen in a supporting lead role in the indie “Paradise Disturbed,” opposite Holt McCallany (“The Iron Claw”). Previous roles include the CBS-OWN series “All Rise,” opposite Wilson Bethel. Additional credits include a supporting role in the top-rated Netflix film “Bright,” starring Will Smith and Joel Edgerton, and a recurring part on NBC’s “Days of our Lives.”

Gray is represented by Adrian Hamerski at Brave Artists Management and lawyer Adam Vitabile at Hirsch Wallerstein Hayum Matlof and Fishman.

Other recurring stars booked for this new round of “Baywatch” include Ashley Moore, Kylar Miranda, Luke Eisner and Charlie McElveen. Paparazzi has been swarming the production’s early days filming in Los Angeles.

Amell will star as Hobie Buchannon, described as the “wild child we all loved from the original series” who “is now a Baywatch Captain, following in the footsteps of his legendary father, Mitch,” per an official synopsis. “Hobie’s world is turned upside down when Charlie, the daughter he never knew, shows up on his doorstep, eager to carry on the Buchannon family legacy and become a Baywatch lifeguard alongside her dad.”
title_zh: 《海灘救護隊》(Baywatch) 新增娜迪亞·格雷(Nadia Gray)為常駐演員。
content_zh:
由馬特·多尼利(Matt Donnelly)報導

首席記者

福斯(Fox)備受期待的《海灘救護隊》(Baywatch)重啟版已確認加入娜迪亞·格雷(Nadia Gray)作為常駐嘉賓演員。

格雷將飾演莉莎(Lisa)，一名急救醫療技術員，與在威尼斯海灘(Venice Beach)奔跑的救生員團隊搭檔。據說這個角色對《海灘救護隊》小組中的某個人有特別的好感。這位演員加入了先前宣布的陣容，包括史蒂芬·阿梅爾(Stephen Amell)、布魯克斯·納德(Brooks Nader)、哈西·哈里森(Hassie Harrison)、謝·米切爾(Shay Mitchell)、傑西卡·貝爾金(Jessica Belkin)、塔迪斯·拉格隆(Thaddeus LaGrone)、莉維·邓(Livvy Dunne)和諾亞·貝克(Noah Beck)。

格雷接下來將在獨立電影《天堂擾動》(Paradise Disturbed)中出演一個主要配角，對手是霍特·麥克卡拉尼(Holt McCallany)（《鋼鐵之爪》(The Iron Claw)）。她之前的角色包括在CBS-OWN系列《全體起立》(All Rise)中與威爾遜·貝瑟爾(Wilson Bethel)搭檔。其他作品還包括在Netflix高評價電影《明亮》(Bright)中飾演配角，該片主演是威爾·史密斯(Will Smith)和喬爾·艾哲頓(Joel Edgerton)，以及在NBC的《我們的生活的日子》(Days of our Lives)中擔任常駐角色。

格雷由布雷夫藝術管理公司(Brave Artists Management)的阿德里安·哈默斯基(Adrian Hamerski)和赫希·瓦勒斯坦·哈尤姆·馬特洛夫與費什曼(Hirsch Wallerstein Hayum Matlof and Fishman)的律師亞當·維塔比爾(Adam Vitabile)代理。

這一輪《海灘救護隊》還預定了其他常駐明星，包括艾什莉·摩爾(Ashley Moore)、凱拉·米蘭達(Kylar Miranda)、盧克·艾斯納(Luke Eisner)和查理·麥克艾爾文(Charlie McElveen)。在洛杉磯拍攝的早期階段，狗仔隊已經蜂擁而至。

阿梅爾將飾演霍比·布坎農(Hobie Buchannon)，官方簡介形容他為“我們都喜愛的原版系列中的‘野孩子’”，他“現在是一名海灘救護隊隊長，追隨著他傳奇父親米奇(Mitch)的腳步。”簡介中提到：“當他從未認識的女兒查理(Charlie)出現在他家門口，渴望延續布坎農家族的傳承並成為與父親並肩作戰的海灘救護隊救生員時，霍比的世界被顛覆了。”

由馬特·多尼利(Matt Donnelly)報導

首席記者

格雷將飾演莉莎(Lisa)，一名急救醫療技術員，與在威尼斯海灘(Venice Beach)奔跑的救生員團隊搭檔。據說這個角色對《海灘救護隊》小組中的某個人有特別的好感。
